title: VERTICES PARTNERS advises TIST Media on seed fundraise
description: TIST Media Private Limited has raised funds from a seed fundraise, at an estimated valuation of $5.9 million, led by Sthira Partners.VERTICES PARTNERS advised TIST Media on this fundraise.The transaction was led by Vishal Mehta (Partner), along with a team that included, Amit Shekhar Dutta (Senior Associate) and Darshan Rajesh Chheda (Associate).Founder and Managing Partner Vinayak Burman provided strategic inputs.TIST Media is a company specializing in influencer marketing campaigns.
